body.notes: Windows box getting exit 1 from claudecode/reading_integrator.py line 423 in main(). See console output 2026-03-22. Likely path or dependency issue. | Stale in_progress lock cleared 2026-03-22. Windows-specific crash — needs Windows box to debug.
body.title: reading_integrator.py crashes on Windows — exit 1 traceback
body.result: Removed 3 sqlite3.connect() calls, replaced with cortex._db() (Postgres-aware via db_proxy). Root cause: DB is Postgres since D126, sqlite path doesn't exist on Windows. 1880 tests pass.
